title: SEXUAL ASSAULT SURVIVOR ADVOCACY - 211info
text: COMMUNITY WORKS SEXUAL ASSAULT SURVIVOR ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advocacy for survivors of sexual assault, including accompaniment to SANE exams, safety planning, resource navigation, emotional support, and systems advocacy, including support groups. 2594 E Barnett Road Suite C Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Any individual who has experienced sexual assault, including stalking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-4357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-4357 Español (541) 779-2393 ext 209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Location is in the RE/MAX building, in a complex on the corner of E Barnett Road and Black Oak Drive. Use the RE/MAX entrance and take stairs or elevator to the lower floor. Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Sexual Assault Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVOR ADVOCACY INFORMATION SERVICES - LABOR AND SEX TRAFFICKING SURVIVOR ADVOCACY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY WORKS
